name: streamhub-monorepo
description: Production-ready, high-performance Content Intelligence & Discovery Platform built with React 19, Vite, TypeScript, Express, Apollo Server (GraphQL), Prisma ORM, and PostgreSQL.
author: Sarath Patti

scripts.setup: sh scripts/setup-db.sh && cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npx prisma db seed
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules backend/dist frontend/node_modules frontend/dist
